description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On September 13, 2024 at 9:15 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on 19th Avenue at Junipero Serra Boulevard.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southbound on 19th Avenue and came to a stop in a queue of traffic for a red light at the intersection with 
Junipero Serra Boulevard. A passenger vehicle in front of the Waymo AV began to roll backwards, and the rear of the passenger car made 
contact with the front of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous 
mode, and a test driver was present (in the driver’s seating position). Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
